briefdescription.para: Get the index of a single chemical species.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the species to find

simplesect.para: Species index (> 0 if found, 0 if not found)

briefdescription.para: Get indices for multiple chemical species.

parameterdescription.para: Array of species names to find
Array of species indices (0 if not found)

briefdescription.para: Check if a chemical species exists in the mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the species to check

simplesect.para: True if species exists, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Get properties of a chemical species.
Create mapping from process species to mechanism species.
Get the index of a single chemical species (type-bound method)
Get indices for multiple chemical species (type-bound method)
Check if a chemical species exists (type-bound method)
Get properties of a chemical species (type-bound method)
Create mapping from process species to mechanism species (type-bound method)
Get molecular weight of a species.
Get list of all available species in the mechanism.
Validate that a list of species are all available.

parameterdescription.para: List of species names to validate
True if all species are available

briefdescription.para: Get list of gas species.
Get list of aerosol species.
Get list of dust species.
Get list of sea salt species.

parameterdescription.para: List of sea salt species names

briefdescription.para: Get list of tracer species.
Filter species by type.

parameterdescription.para: List of species names matching the type

briefdescription.para: Get concentration units for a species.
Parse a comma-separated species list.
Get density of a species (type-bound method)
Get radius of a species (type-bound method)
Check if species is a gas (type-bound method)
Check if species is an aerosol (type-bound method)
Check if species is dust (type-bound method)
Check if species is sea salt (type-bound method)
Check if species is a tracer (type-bound method)
Check if species undergoes dry deposition (type-bound method)
Check if species undergoes photolysis (type-bound method)
Get background concentration of a species (type-bound method)
Filter species by type (type-bound method)
